meta.content: width=device-width, initial-scale=1, shrink-to-fit=no, minimum-scale=1, maximum-scale=1, user-scalable=no
meta.name: viewport

meta.expr:content: data:blog.title + " - Explore high-fidelity tech topics, developer blogs, AI trends, and structural container architectures on our platform."
meta.name: description

meta.expr:content: data:blog.title + " - Explore high-fidelity tech topics, developer blogs, AI trends, and structural container architectures on our platform."

div.class: fixed inset-0 w-full max-w-[400px] mx-auto flex flex-col bg-white shadow-2xl overflow-hidden border-x border-slate-100 z-10 font-sans

header.class: w-full bg-white border-b border-gray-50 pt-3 pb-2 px-5 flex items-center justify-between shrink-0 z-20

div.class: flex items-center space-x-2.5
w-8 h-8 bg-blue-600 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center relative shadow-sm shrink-0
flex items-center space-x-1.5

span.class: text-[7.5px] font-black text-blue-600 bg-blue-50 border border-blue-100 rounded px-1.5 py-0.2 uppercase tracking-wider font-mono

div.class: flex items-center space-x-1.5

button.class: w-7 h-7 rounded-full border border-slate-100 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50 relative

span.class: absolute top-1 right-1.5 w-1.5 h-1.5 bg-red-500 rounded-full border border-white hidden

button.class: w-7 h-7 rounded-full border border-slate-100 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 text-slate-600 hover:bg-slate-50

div.class: hidden bg-slate-50 px-5 py-2 border-b border-slate-100 animate-slide-down

input.class: w-full bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-md px-2.5 py-1.5 text-[10px] text-slate-800 placeholder-slate-400 focus:outline-none focus:border-slate-400
input.name: q

button.class: bg-slate-950 hover:bg-slate-800 text-white rounded-md px-3 py-1.5 text-[10px] font-bold

main.class: flex-1 overflow-y-auto no-scrollbar pb-[64px] bg-white relative

div.class: bg-amber-50 border-b border-amber-100 py-1.5 px-5 flex items-center overflow-hidden gap-2 shrink-0 select-none
bg-amber-100 text-amber-950 text-[6.5px] font-black uppercase tracking-widest px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded shrink-0 animate-pulse border border-amber-200
flex-1 overflow-hidden relative h-3.5 flex items-center font-bold text-[8.5px] text-amber-900
div.marquee: ✨ Welcome to the Yondaime Blogger Engine! Enjoy premium fast loading speeds, sitemaps, Cloudinary image integrations, dynamic comments, and bookmark panel!

div.class: px-5 pt-3.5 pb-2 border-b border-slate-50 bg-slate-50/50
flex items-center space-x-1.5 text-[8px] text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-widest font-mono font-bold

h2.class: text-[12px] font-bold font-display tracking-tight text-slate-950 mt-1

div.class: flex items-center space-x-4 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar py-2 text-[10.5px] font-bold text-slate-500

a.class: tab-item whitespace-nowrap
tab-item whitespace-nowrap
tab-item whitespace-nowrap
tab-item whitespace-nowrap
tab-item whitespace-nowrap

button.class: whitespace-nowrap flex items-center space-x-0.5 text-slate-400 font-bold

div.class: px-5 pt-3.5 pb-1
relative aspect-[16/9] w-full rounded-xl overflow-hidden bg-slate-900 group shadow-sm

img.class: absolute inset-0 w-full h-full object-cover opacity-75 group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-700 dynamic-cloudinary

div.class: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-slate-950 via-slate-900/30 to-transparent
absolute bottom-3.5 left-3.5 right-3.5 flex flex-col justify-end text-white
flex items-center space-x-1.5 mb-2

h2.class: text-[12px] font-black tracking-tight leading-snug line-clamp-2 font-display

div.h2: The Ultimate Guide to Modern Micro-Services, Edge Intelligence, and Container Architecture

px-5 py-3.5
flex items-center justify-between mb-3.5

article.class: flex space-x-3 group border-b border-slate-100 pb-3.5 last:border-0 last:pb-0
